form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 39-day let-up. First-up after four months struggled in the run home; ran last of 9 at this track on March 2 over 1400m, 15 len behind Over You with 54kg at $2.20. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Kasamatsu on September 12 over 1400m, 1.0 len behind Go Go Melody with 55kg at $2.10. Leading chance with plenty of upside.
